name: UNetlight
description: Lightweight UNet variant for fast inference with good accuracy. Perfect for real-time segmentation on resource-limited devices.

name: UNet
description: Classic encoder-decoder architecture excellent for medical and general image segmentation. Balanced performance for most use cases.

name: DeeplabV3+
description: State-of-the-art dilated convolution model for high-quality segmentation. Best choice when accuracy is paramount.

name: PSPNet
description: Pyramid pooling network that captures multi-scale context. Great for complex scenes with objects at different scales.
